---
title: "Balans"
format: html
---

Balans is a project-based data and AI engineering practice for government and public institutions. We conceive and deliver modern, streamlined, accessible, and sovereign tooling without the overhead of long-term vendor contracts.

## Choose Us If:

- You need a completed project, not another platform subscription.
- Your mandate has a deadline.
- Your resources don't stretch to a multi-year vendor relationship.
- Your data can't sit on infrastructure or architecture, you don't control, or cannot audit.

## On This Page:

- **[See how Balans compares to long-term vendor contracts →](#why-balans-why-now)**
- **[See service tiers →](#services)**
- **[Learn what "balans" means →](#about-the-name)**
- **[Get in touch →](#contact)**

## Why Balans, Why Now?

Government modernization is usually sold as a platform: a subscription, a dashboard platform, a multi-year contract that outlives the mandate it was built for. Balans works differently — embedded, scoped, and finished for your scenario, your devices, your use-case.

We follow a forward-deployed model: an engineer working directly against your mandate, inside your constraints, until the deliverable is complete and handed over — not retained as an ongoing expenditure and dependency.

This approach is grounded in hands-on Government of Canada experience and graduate training in eGovernment — paired with modern, open-source data engineering practice. The result: solutions built with *your* conventions and standards accounted for.

## Built For The Challenge Function (And The Future of Work)

- **Local-first, sovereign by default.** Data and models run on infrastructure you control. Nothing routes through third-party cloud services unless you choose it.
- **No vendor lock-in.** Deliverables are handed over complete — code, decisions, training materials — not licensed back to you.
- **Project-based, not subscription-based.** Defined scope, defined end date — built to fit standard contracting vehicles rather than requiring a new procurement category.
- **Standards-compliant from day one.** Built to WCAG 2.2 AAA and FAIR data principles, so outputs pass departmental review the first time.

## What We Do

**Data Engineering**
Custom pipelines, ETL, and infrastructure to turn raw data into actionable assets—always with sovereignty and scalability in mind.

**AI/ML Engineering**
From proof-of-concept to production, we build and deploy models that solve real-world problems, with transparency and fairness at the core.

**Data Strategy, Governance & Compliance**
Align your data with organizational goals, regulatory requirements, and best practices (e.g.: WCAG 2.2 AAA, FAIR).

**Sovereign Tooling**
Local, in-process, on-device, inference and tooling by default — ensuring data sovereignty, privacy, and control.

**Reporting & Analytical Deliverables**
Provide actionable insights through reports, notebooks, dashboards, and custom AI layers that draw on your project’s data and your team’s knowledge.

## Services

Every engagement is scoped before it's priced — the tiers below are for planning purposes, not a binding quote.

| Tier | Features | Typical timeline | Price range (CAD)* |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Scope** | Forensic data audit, FAIR assessment, scoping report | 4–6 weeks | $7,500 – $9,500 |
| **Architect** | Data cleaning, vault/lake structuring, pipeline development | 8–12 weeks | $35,000 – $80,000 |
| **Enable** | End-to-end build, SQL/reporting layer, local LLM integration, training materials | 12 weeks+ | $85,000 – $140,000 |

*Final pricing depends on data volume, schema complexity, and current data quality — price ranges are confirmed with the purchase of a Scope tier service. Scope tier service required before any contract is signed for Architect and Enable tiers. Not every project will require all mentioned features.*

**[Request an estimate →](mailto:fbbgqh51@duck.com)**

## About the name

Several cultures share the idea of something being “just right” (not too much, not too little). Like the Earth’s axial tilt, a small but well-placed adjustment can be what makes everything feel optimized, well-balanced. That’s the standard we hold ourselves to.

## Contact

Have a project in mind, or just want to talk through your options first? Reach out — a first conversation costs nothing and commits you to nothing.

**[Email Balans →](mailto:fbbgqh51@duck.com)**
